title: Switching identity anchor is contradictory across control surfaces
description: The control board says `tables/switching_canonical_identity.csv` is present, the Switching workstream row says that reference is downgraded because the file is missing, and the path is absent in the repository. This creates contradictory canonical-state signaling on an active canonical module.

title: Relaxation ver3 lacks exact-token canonicalization coverage
description: `docs/system_registry.json` is authoritative for active-module identity, but it lists `Relaxation ver3` while the canonical-status and workstream tables track `Relaxation`. Exact-match coverage or join logic will treat the authoritative active token as uncovered unless an explicit alias rule exists.

title: MT coverage workstream still describes the pre-row gap
description: The `mt_canonicalization_coverage` workstream row exists, but its `primary_blocker` still says canonicalization coverage rows were missing. That stale blocker text obscures the current tracked state and can mislead follow-up automation about whether the gap is already covered.
